name: netease-cloud-music
author: Node-RED Conversion
description: Netease Cloud Music listened song count
description-cn: 显示网易云音乐听歌总数

inputs.label: Netease UID
inputs.description: Open your Netease Cloud Music web profile; the number after id= in the URL is your UID, e.g. https://music.163.com/#/user/home?id=123456.
inputs.description-cn: 打开网易云音乐网页版个人主页，URL 中 id= 后面的数字就是 UID，例如 https://music.163.com/#/user/home?id=123456。

headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/80.0.3987.163 Safari/537.36
